# host_hostname (Resource)

Manages the system hostname.

On Linux this resource uses `hostnamectl`. On macOS it uses `scutil --set HostName`. Destroying the resource removes it from Terraform state and leaves the live hostname unchanged.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_hostname" "default" {
  name = "workstation"
}
```

## Import

Import the current hostname by name:

```shell
terraform import host_hostname.default workstation
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) System hostname.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `name`.
